use_cases: Hero section background animation for landing pages
Ambient visual effect for portfolio or creative websites
Decorative background for SaaS product pages
Loading or idle state visualization for web applications
Background animation for media and entertainment sites
ai_summary: A particle-based wave animation built with Three.js that renders a grid of 5000+ particles with time-based sinusoidal wave motion. Features a transparent background with customizable parameters including particle count, wave speed, intensity, color, and grid spacing. The animation uses custom vertex shaders for smooth performance and runs continuously with requestAnimationFrame. Designed as a lightweight, visually striking background effect for hero sections, landing pages, or ambient decoration.
